svg.aria-label: Week-4 April 2026 rollup SAP npm supply-chain attack DPRK AI npm malware, VECT 2.0 wiper ransomware ESXi cross-platform, SGLang CVE-2026-5760 SSRF critical
svg.title: 2026-04-30: Week-4 April rollup - npm worm, DPRK supply chain, VECT 2.0

g.text: SAP npm credential theft + DPRK AI-injected RAT + self-propagating npm worm + LofyGang : npm ecosystem under siege
SBOM weekly audit : lockfile pin all npm deps : block scoped unknowns
Rotate dev tokens : ban unverified scoped packages : run npm audit in every CI job : KICS Docker scan
VECT 2.0 wiper ransomware destroys files >131 KB : ESXi + Windows + Linux : crypto flaw : ransom useless
Air-gap + WORM backup rehearsal : FIM on large artefacts
ESXi SSH lockdown + MFA : Falco/osquery FIM rules : immutable backup restore drill : no ransom payment
SGLang LLM serving framework SSRF CVE-2026-5760 : attacker reaches internal network + cloud metadata : IMDSv2 bypass
Patch SGLang immediately : enforce IMDSv2 + egress filter
Block outbound from AI serving pods : cloud metadata endpoint lockdown : network policy deny-all default
